activities.comment: Day 1 and almost 5 months to the day since my tibial osteotomy and knee surgery. My first walk. When I was done, I felt like I had run a half marathon. Endurance is gone. Lung capacity is shot. Not sure how I’m going to do this. 😣🫤
Had to skip yesterday. Laid in bed all day. So weak. Laid in bed all day today as well but got up and knocked out 4.2. It was all I had. 😓💔
Had to get picked up on Davis after 3 miles. Rest of miles were yard miles. 😔 Trying to get stronger.
Less fatigued today but still weak. Still need the walking stick. Speed is non existent. Levee and yard miles. ✔️🙌🏼
I can’t believe I’m this slow. Walking is painful. 💔😓
My right hip hurts. Just like before surgery. Not sure I can do this. 😭💔😞
Feel a little stronger today. PT helped A LOT. Today I feel like I’m making progress with PT. Yard miles.
Yard miles. Pushed myself today. I’m EXHAUSTED. Feel like I ran a marathon. 🥴 Proud of myself for this many steps/miles.
Yard miles. On the struggle bus. So slow. 😖
Yard miles. In pain and struggling. 😰😖
EGD day. Hospital steps. 😞
I’m trying. 😭
Everyday seems to be a struggle. This is as much as I could do. Missing the version of me that could knock out a 5-miler in 45 minutes. 😭💔
Feeling a little stronger today. Still in pain but not as much. 🙏🏻🙌🏼
Not sure how I managed this much today. I’m definitely struggling. 😭
Pushing through… not sure how I’ll make up all the lost miles… 😞💔
I’m slowing down and getting weaker. Had to skip yesterday. So weak.
Yard miles. Was feeling a little stronger today so I pushed a little more. Had to quit at three miles because I was hurting too much. 😭😞💔
So sick. Not sure I’m going to survive this.💔😭😔
Recovering from being in the ER on Friday. I’m in so much pain. 😭😭💔💔
Back in the ER for another 4 hours. 😭💔😔 I’m in so much pain…. 😭😭
Feeling a little better today after my visit to the ER and all the pain meds they gave me. Walked in the yard and at the Nursery with Stephanie. Feeling very weak.
Feeling too weak to do much today. I managed a few miles in the yard today.
Still feeling very weak. I have to stay close to the house because I’m not feeling well. Yard miles.
Still feeling very weak. Went outside to walk in the yard and get some sunshine. This is all I could manage.
Feeling stronger today. The pain has reduced a little bit s I walked with Stephanie and then walked in the yard. I’m so slow. Not sure how I will ever recover from this.
Not feeling as strong today. Still in a lot of pain. Pushed myself to do this many miles. Yard miles. Had to take lots of breaks.
Starting to get a little of my strength back. Still incredibly slow and weak. I remember when I could run 5 miles in about 48 minutes. Will I ever get that back? 😭💔
Yard miles today in the sunshine. Time on my feet. ✔️ I may be slow but I’m not giving up.
Super weak and tired. Maybe I overdid yesterday? Trying to stay at it so I can regain the muscle I’ve lost from the osteotomy.
Got a little strength back so I went further. ✔️🙌🏼♥️
Trying to hit 4.5 a day and push myself.  Yard miles today. Time on my feet to see how the knee holds up. Staying close to home.
Not feeling as weak today but I can’t even begin to think about make-up miles. Just gotta rest and push through these shorter miles to get my glutes and quads stronger.
Yard miles today. Knee is still buckling and it freaks me out when it happens. Gotta get the quad stronger.
Managed to go a little further today. Super slow but grateful for the distance. Knee swells quite a bit.
Managed to get in a little extra. 🙏🏻♥️🙌🏼
This is all I could manage today. Feeling very weak again. One day at a time.
Grateful I could get in this many miles after feeling so weak yesterday. Yard miles again so I could stay close to home.
So slow but grateful for the distance. Using a walking stick for stability because the knee is still buckling. Can’t go up a curb with my left leg. 💔😭
Although the knee swells quite a bit, I am managing to keep the distance, even though I am incredibly slow.
Proud of myself for maintaining this distance for the past three days. Yard miles again so I can stay close to home.
Wiped out. 😭💔 So slow and weak.
Completely wiped out. Literally no strength. Legs are so weak. It’s all I could manage.
Doing a little less to let my body regain some strength. It’s all I could do. 💔😭🙏🏻
I managed to get more distance in today, even though I am incredibly weak. My body wants to quit, but I’m keeping myself mentally strong.✔️💪🏼🙌🏼♥️🙏🏻
Feeling exhausted and depleted. These miles were a struggle but I got it done. ✔️💪🏼
